RMU_STORYBOARD.Title: RMU Combat Storyboard
RMU_STORYBOARD.Wizard.Hints.Roster: Review and edit the physical descriptions of the combatants to ensure visual consistency in the generated images.
RMU_STORYBOARD.Wizard.Hints.PageTarget: How many comic pages the LLM should attempt to condense this combat into.
RMU_STORYBOARD.Wizard.Hints.CampaignCont: This persistent world context prevents the AI from hallucinating the wrong environment.
RMU_STORYBOARD.Wizard.Placeholders.Campa: e.g. Dark, gritty, mud-soaked clearing within a dense forest. The party is exhausted and fighting for their lives.
RMU_STORYBOARD.Wizard.Empty.Roster: No combatants found in the roster.
RMU_STORYBOARD.Wizard.Notifications.Limi: Highlight limit reached for your target page count. Deselect an event before adding another.
RMU_STORYBOARD.Wizard.Hints.Export: Your curated director's script is compiled below in Dense Notation.
RMU_STORYBOARD.Wizard.Notifications.Copy: Failed to copy to clipboard. See console for details.
RMU_STORYBOARD.Wizard.Hints.ArtStyle: The visual aesthetic applied to the generated image prompts.
RMU_STORYBOARD.Dialogs.SaveLogPrompt: Combat has ended. Would you like to save the RMU Combat Storyboard event log to a Journal Entry so you can generate a script or images later?
RMU_STORYBOARD.Wizard.Hints.LogSelection: Load a previously saved combat encounter from your Journal to generate a script.
RMU_STORYBOARD.Dialogs.JournalPageText: This is a raw data log for the RMU Combat Storyboard. Please open the Storyboard Wizard from the Combat Tracker to view, curate, and compile this script.
RMU_STORYBOARD.Wizard.Roster.Environment: Various environmental hazards, falling, traps, etc.
RMU_STORYBOARD.Wizard.HowToUse.Step1Inst: Click the button above to copy the prompt, roster and combat data.
RMU_STORYBOARD.Wizard.HowToUse.Step2Inst: Paste the copied text into your preferred AI (e.g., ChatGPT, Gemini, Claude) to generate your cinematic comic script and image prompts.
RMU_STORYBOARD.Wizard.HowToUse.Step3Inst: Copy the image prompt code blocks generated by the AI in Step 2, one by one, and paste them into your preferred image-generation model (like ChatGPT Plus/DALL-E 3, Gemini Pro, or Midjourney) to generate the images for each page.
